case_title: KELLY MARENBERG VS. TOTAL CARE PLUS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARENBERG, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT TOTAL CARE PLUS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
